hero.title: Your Files, Securely in the Cloud
hero.subtitle: Experience seamless file management with 20GB of free storage. Share files effortlessly with permission control.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need for seamless file management

storage.title: 20GB Free Storage
storage.description: Get started with generous free storage for all your important files and documents.

sharing.title: Easy Sharing
sharing.description: Share files with just a phone number. Complete control over who can access what.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: End-to-end encryption keeps your files safe and secure at all times.

sync.title: Real-time Sync
sync.description: Your files stay in sync across all your devices automatically.

collab.title: Collaboration
collab.description: Work together seamlessly with real-time collaboration features.

mobile.title: Mobile First
mobile.description: Access your files anytime, anywhere from any device.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to get started

step1.title: Sign Up
step1.description: Create your account with just your email and phone number.

step2.title: Upload Files
step2.description: Drag and drop files or use the upload button to add your content.

step3.title: Share & Collaborate
step3.description: Share files by phone number and collaborate with your team.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs

permissions.title: Smart Permission Control
permissions.subtitle: Share files your way with granular permission settings
permissions.description: Control exactly what your collaborators can do with shared files. Set expiration dates, limit downloads, and revoke access instantly.
